positive: A whimsical, storybook illustration of a sleepy fox wearing a small pair of spectacles, sitting on a stack of old books in a cozy forest clearing. The style should be reminiscent of Studio Ghibli or Beatrix Potter, with soft lighting, warm tones, and intricate natural details. Digital painting, high detail, inviting atmosphere.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, scary, modern elements
